subject: Re: Fwd: COE

body_html:
crazy

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

I already e-mailed Amy's e-mail to Casner and asked
Casner whether he still
maintains that we should wait the full two weeks
before contacting Castillo.

I'll be at Ritz Carlton Club starting tomorrow
afternoon. My cell phone
(646) 667-9681 is on if you need me for any reason.
I packed the documents that
I thought might be needed while away and gave Amanda
instructions on how to
get to me any other documents that may require my
attention while I am away.

Have a good weekend.

Darren

From: "Amy Claire Dempsey" bioimpact@islands.vi
To: "'Jamey Casner'" jcasner@vilawyers.com,
DKIESQ@aol.com,
wfmccomb.eng@attglobal.net
Subject: RE: COE
Date: Fri, 28 Apr 2006 18:04:01 -0300

Just got off the phone from Cedano. He is really
crying. He is so so far
behind. He said he has to finish Enighed, Lovango
and then LSJ. He is just
not being able get anything done. He said it will
be a few more weeks
before he will have a chance to look at LSJ. We did
discuss the project
briefly and I did tell him that we incorporated
everything he asked. As
things seem to be going over there I think is a
couple of weeks will at
least be a month unless we can find someway of
pushing our application to
the top.

Amy

From: Jamey Casner [mailto:jcasner@vilawyers.com]
Sent: Friday, April 21, 2006 4:51 PM
To: DKIESQ@aol.com; bioimpact@islands.vi;
wfmccomb.eng@attglobal.net;
jcasner@vilawyers.com
Subject: RE: COE

I just spoke with Mr. Cedeno. I tried to reach
Castillo, but was put
through to Cedeno. He cried overworked and
overwhelmed for a variety of
reasons, said he could not even look at it for
another two to three weeks
and when he does he will contact Amy to let her know
whether the last
submission (post inspection) was accepted as final.
He told me to call
again in a couple of weeks to nudge him. I have not
yet received any letter
from DPNR advising re: minor permit. Bill - Have
you as primary contact?
ajc

-----Original Message-----
From: DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com]
Sent: Tuesday, March 28, 2006 6:39 PM
To: bioimpact@islands.vi;
wfmccomb.eng@attglobal.net; jcasner@vilawyers.com
Subject: Re: COE

Jamie,

Better for you to call. I will just be an outsider.
Please call as soon as
you can and let me know what happens. Thanks.

Darren
